name: research-assistant
description: A Claude Code plugin for Stats/ML researchers developing new algorithms. A research-conductor autopilot (/research) sequences three skills from idea to paper: literature-explorer (multi-perspective survey), algo-brainstorm (gap → formalize → ideate → novelty-check → theory → toy → ablation → red-team), and paper-writer (venue-aware drafting with citation auditing). A standalone, stateless peer-reviewer (/review) referees other people's manuscripts with a venue-tailored report and a review-ethics gate.
